title: Eyeshield 21
synopsis: Welcome To the Gridiron of the Damned! Huge hulking bodies throw themselves at each other, while a tiny lithe body runs between them for the goal! No, it’s not a game of football, it’s Sena Kobayakawa trying to evade the monstrous Ha-Ha brothers down the halls of Deimon High School! But wait! Sena’s incredible skills at not getting caught have been spotted by the devilish (possibly actually demonic) captain of the school’s embryonic American style football team, and when Sena asks to be the teams manager, he gets thrust onto the field as a running back instead! But there are two BIG catches: first, to keep the identity of their new “star” player an absolute secret, Yoichi makes Sena wear an opaque visor on his helmet and gives him the alias of “Eyeshield 21.” And the second catch? Well, in order to hit his fastest “speed of light” running mode, Sena usually has to be absolutely terrified. Not that THAT will be a problem with t

title: Zeikin de Katta Hon
synopsis: Ishidaira is a delinquent who visited the library for the first time since elementary school. But then, he was pointed out by Hayasameru and Shirai, who works at the library, that he has not returned a book that he borrowed ten years ago. A manga about how Ishidaira went from trying to borrow a book from a library to working there instead. (Source: Kodansha, translated)

title: Seishun Meisaku Anime
synopsis: Two episodes, adaptation of Masao Kume's Student Days and Saneatsu Mushanokoji's The Friend Who Didn't Believe in Friendship , were not broadcast in the original run, appearing instead as two "specials" on TV Asahi the following year. (Source: The Anime Encyclopedia, edited)

titleNative: 魔法使いロゼの佐渡ライフ
synonyms: The Sado Life of Rosé the witch
synopsis: Rose escapes from her own world... and ends up on "Sado Island"? This is the start of a daily-life comedy where she and Sana, a girl who lives on the island, try to make the most of every day! (Source: Comic Fuz, translated)

hashtag: #魔法使いロゼの佐渡ライフ #佐渡ライフ

title: Lawless Love
synopsis: Midnight. A construction site. A man with a colored corn head and a woman with pink hair meet in a powerful encounter. A provocative tale of love, right and wrong over a quarter of a century between two outcasts. A sensational subject matter and a staggered ethical viewpoints are explored in this latest work of the artist’s best work! We run, leaving the world behind. Note: Won the Japanese Grand Prize at the 9th New Chitose Airport International Animation Festival in 2022.

title: MAHOROBA
synopsis: At the Hudsucker corporate headquarters, a salaryman (“Me”) is the constant target of his hulking, bald, perverted boss’ violent retribution. Bittersweet childhood memories of Me’s late grandmother keep him going, but his brutal work life pushes him to the breaking point. Me gets sweet revenge and hightails it out of Tokyo, only to have his airplane violently hijacked. He’s dumped into the Pacific Ocean and onto the shores of remote island Mahoroba (an ancient Japanese word describing a far-off utopia). Note: Screened at the 13th Shimokitazawa Film Festival on September 20, 2021, where it also won the Grand Prize among 12 nominated works.

tags.name: Office

title: LOCA!
synopsis: The story takes place in a world where human civilization has collapsed and fallen into ruin. In this world, there are people who live in groups and people who live individually, moving around. – a world of freedom, so to speak. Two girls, Haru and Tamo, who live in such a world, board an old train they come across by chance and travel through the decadent world day by day. (Source: Niigata International Animation Film Festival) Notes: - Initially pre-screened at the Niigata International Animation Film Festival on March 15, 2025, as well as at the Fantasia Film Festival on July 19, 2025. - Selected for the Fantasia Film Festival Anime no Bento official selection highlighting indie talent, as well as winning the audience award and gold award in the Animated Short category at the Fantasia Film Festival 2025.

title: Heart Cocktail Again: Koi no Rensa

title: FATAL FURY x STREET FIGHTER
titleNative: 餓狼伝説 × ストリートファイター

Garou Densetsu x Street Fighter Animated Trailer
Garou Densetsu: City of the Wolves x Street Fighter 6
synopsis: Special animated commercials for the video game collaboration between Fatal Fury: City of the Wolves and Street Fighter 6, adding Ken and Chun Li as playable characters to the game.

title: Run Run Lantern
synopsis: Special 25th anniversary commemorative promotional video for P.A. Works looking back at the studio's titles they have made. Note: Originally screened at the P.A. Works 25th anniversary Lantern Festival on October 19, 2025. The video was later uploaded to their YouTube channel on October 22, 2025.

title: Maru-neun Gangjwi
synopsis: Woo-Ri’s 5-year old poodle mix, Maru, has turned into a human — a 5-year old little girl, that is! Now Woo-Ri’s gone from pet owner to big sister, and it’s her job to keep Maru out of trouble. Human Maru has the same endless curiosity and playfulness of a puppy, but now she can walk into grocery stores, go to kindergarten, and check this out — hold things with her opposable thumbs. Being human rules! (Source: WEBTOON, edited)

tags.name: Episodic

tags.name: Female Protagonist

title: Digimon Story Time Stranger Prelude
titleNative: デジモンストーリー タイムストレンジャー Prelude
synonyms: Digimon Story Time Stranger Anime Short
synopsis: Short prologue animation released as a prelude and advertisement for the game Digimon Story Time Stranger . Set to Digimon Story Time Stranger's theme song "wherever you are", the Prelude short focuses on Inori and her younger brother just before the main story's events. (Source: Bandai Namco Entertainment's YouTube Channel)

title: Sora wa Akai Kawa no Hotori
titleRomaji: Sora wa Akai Kawa no Hotori
synopsis: Yuri, a pretty Japanese girl, is ecstatic after passing her college entrance exam and having her first kiss with her childhood friend-turned boyfriend. However, her luck soon changes. She starts to notice that water becomes agitated whenever she goes near it. One night, hands appear out of a puddle on the street and drag her into the water! Transported to an ancient village in the Middle East, she is then captured by armed troops and taken to the Queen's palace for a human sacrifice. (Source: VIZ Media)

title: Di Ling Ai: Mo Shui Linglong
titleRomaji: Di Ling Ai: Mo Shui Linglong
synopsis: All things possess a spirit, and the power of nature coalesced into various conscious fairies. However, due to humanity's neglect of nature and the awakening of suppressed powers, the fairies have been harmed. A human girl encounters a fairy from the depths of the water and they have known each other for many years. However, they cannot overcome the barrier between celestial and mortal. On a wondrous journey, the girl resolves to find her own power. She believes that humanity is also part of nature, and that there must be a way for humans and nature to coexist harmoniously. Can she protect nature? (Source: Bilibili, translated)

title: Odebu Akujo ni Tensei Shitara, Naze ka Last Boss Ouji-sama ni Shuuchaku Sareteimasu
titleRomaji: Odebu Akujo ni Tensei Shitara, Naze ka Last Boss Ouji-sama ni Shuuchaku Sareteimasu
titleNative: おデブ悪女に転生したら、なぜかラスボス王子様に執着されています
synonyms: The Final-Boss Prince is Somehow Obsessed with the Chubby Villainess: Reincarnated Me
When I Reincarnated as a Chubby Villainess, For Some Reason, I'm Being Relentlessly Pursued by the Final Boss Prince!
synopsis: After dying of illness, she has been reincarnated as Celine, the selfish, fat, villainous duchess, sister of the heroine of a popular novel. If she stays this way, she will be killed by the hero prince and die a miserable death, just as in the novel. She vows to reform herself with all her might and begins to struggle, but she finds herself caught up in unexpected doting and obsession..! Will Celine be able to find "peaceful happiness"? A fantasy love story about a reincarnation in another world where she is loved too much by a Yandere. (Source: Pocket Comics)

title: Tulip-chan
synopsis: Graduate work of Saki Watanabe at Tohoku University of Art and Design, 2024. Tulip-chan, a slightly unusual fifth grade elementary school student, dreams of having her grandchild celebrate her 60th birthday.

tags.name: Boys' Love
tags.description: Prominently features romance between two males, not inherently sexual.

title: Carrots Don't Wait
titleNative: ニンジンは待ってくれない
synopsis: Graduation work of Lina Machida at Tokyo University of the Arts (Geidai), 2023. That stray dog that the girl loved so much wanted an apple for a long time. Meanwhile, the carrots try to turn everything into a seedbed. The girl opens the box and leaves with the dog because they know that decay is inevitable. This animation captures a moment of overlapping birth and death. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Ginga Tetsudou 999: Glass no Clair (3D)
titleNative: 銀河鉄道999～ガラスのクレア～（3D）
synopsis: Remake of the Glass no Clair special, featuring a 3D stereoscopic animation based on the original work by Leiji Matsumoto. This is the second time Matsumoto's work has been made into a 3D film.

title: Akami Karubi Henshin Movie
titleNative: 赤見かるび 変身ムービー
synopsis: Animated short made to promote the new 3D model of Japanese VTuber Karubi Akami. First shown at CR FES 2025 and later showcased on the debut stream of her new 3D model on Twitch and YouTube.

title: Mahjong Soul X Gintama Collab - Anime Preview
titleRomaji: Jongtama x Gintama Collab Kettei Promotion Anime
titleEnglish: Mahjong Soul X Gintama Collab - Anime Preview
titleNative: 雀魂×銀魂コラボ決定プロモーションアニメ
synopsis: An animated collab PV between Mahjong Soul and Gintama to commemorate the in-game collaboration.

title: Xi Yangyang Yu Hui Tailang: Gu Guguai Jie You Guguai
titleRomaji: Xi Yangyang Yu Hui Tailang: Gu Guguai Jie You Guguai
titleNative: 喜羊羊与灰太狼之古古怪界有古怪
synopsis: The thirty-second season of Xi Yangyang Yu Hui Tailang .

title: Nasreddin
synopsis: Long ago, in the western regions of Gamma, the land split into two major factions: mages and sorcerers. Young Nasreddin and Louis grew up under the care of their grandfather Tokrak. One day, the Sand Demon King's forces attacked Nasreddin's home city, the fire continent, and Tokrak lost both hands in the process. From then on, Nasreddin made many companions and embarked on a journey to find the Jade Dragon Ring and save the western regions. (Source: Bilibili, translated)
